steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=-3x+60$, and the question asks for the output when $x=-8$. Substitute $-8$ for $x$ before simplifying.

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content:
$$f(-8)=-3(-8)+60$$
$$f(-8)=24+60=84$$
The computed value matches the listed choice. The answer is D.
